title: Swiss Alps Mountain Trek
description: Experience the breathtaking beauty of the Swiss Alps on this challenging 7-day trek. Journey through pristine alpine meadows, crystal-clear mountain lakes, and towering peaks.
short_description: 7-day challenging trek through pristine alpine landscapes
cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 14 days before departure. 50% refund 7-14 days before. No refund less than 7 days.
included_items: [{"title":"Mountain Guide","description":"Professional guide throughout trek"},{"title":"Accommodation","description":"Mountain huts and guesthouses"},{"title":"Meals","description":"All meals during trek"},{"title":"Equipment","description":"Safety equipment rental"}]
excluded_items: [{"title":"Flights","description":"Airfare to/from Switzerland"},{"title":"Personal Gear","description":"Hiking boots and clothing"},{"title":"Travel Insurance","description":"Required for all trekkers"},{"title":"Tips","description":"Guide and staff tips"}]
physical_requirements: Good physical fitness required. Must be able to hike 6-8 hours daily.
visa_requirements: Schengen visa required for most nationalities.

title: Maldives Beach Escape
description: Relax on pristine white-sand beaches, snorkel in crystal-clear waters, and enjoy luxury beachfront accommodations in this tropical paradise.
short_description: 5-day tropical paradise with water sports and relaxation
cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 7 days before departure. 25% refund 3-7 days before.
included_items: [{"title":"Resort Stay","description":"4 nights beachfront resort"},{"title":"Meals","description":"All-inclusive dining"},{"title":"Water Sports","description":"Snorkeling and kayaking"},{"title":"Transfers","description":"Airport speedboat transfers"}]

title: Kyoto Cultural Journey
description: Immerse yourself in traditional Japanese culture with visits to ancient temples, traditional tea ceremonies, and authentic kaiseki dining experiences.
short_description: 6-day immersive Japanese culture and heritage experience
cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 10 days before departure.

title: Serengeti Wildlife Safari
description: Witness the Great Migration and encounter Africa's Big Five on this unforgettable 8-day safari adventure through Tanzania's most spectacular wildlife reserves.

description: Follow the ancient Inca Trail to the lost city of Machu Picchu, camping under the stars and exploring archaeological wonders.
